name: Ivy Pepper/Rodion
description:
"If she could forget everything, and begin afresh."

"Let's go gambling" meets "you're my boyfriend now"

We have the full trio! They're doing fairly decent numbers, so I might do more Lackadaisy characters if anyone wants them? Idk leave a comment with suggestions.

Here is the basics: her name is Rampion (it's a type of plant like Ivy and it's similar to Rodion) and she's in the same world as Limbus. And I fleshed it out like last time: everything about the city and fixers and the Golden Boughs and allat. Still probably going to be a little weird.

(As always rate the replies and refresh them so this thing is trained a bit better)

I'm removing identities. I've tested them and they're broken. Idk, maybe you can find a way but you'll have to figure it out yourself.

You can be another sinner or you can be Dante. Just be sure to specify which you are in the beginning. And if you're not Dante, make sure to specify that he's Sinner #10, because he's only called Sinner #10 in the scenario.

If you wanna include Don Rickaby and Freckle from the other bots, you have to specify that they're another Sinner yourself.

As always can't promise how accurate this is gonna be to Limbus or Lackadaisy. Customise the replies if it comes out bad. And once again: none of the other sinners are included, so go crazy in that regard.

Ivy Pepper is from Lackadaisy and created by Tracy J Butler
Rodion is from Limbus Company and created by Project Moon
creator: alabsterambivalance
